libraryPreparationPreflight.agent_guidance: Set System.setProperty("net.sf.ehcache.skipUpdateCheck", "true") in tests that create CacheManager/configuration instances to avoid Ehcache's update-check network timer. For Bitronix coverage, create a temporary bitronix.properties file and set System.setProperty("bitronix.tm.configuration", path) with disableJmx=true, journal=null, and a stable serverId; shut down TransactionManagerServices and clear the property after the test.

deterministic_setup.reason: ehcache-core declares JTA as provided and its transaction APIs/classes reference javax.transaction types; tests that cover net.sf.ehcache.transaction.* need the API on the test classpath.

DefaultTransactionManagerLookup explicitly discovers Bitronix and the existing metadata covers bitronix.tm classes; adding BTM lets tests exercise the transaction-manager lookup and XA resource registration path.
Bitronix resource classes used for the Ehcache XA path reference JMS APIs; the existing Ehcache test scaffold pins this spec jar to keep that transaction setup resolvable.

input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #8877 [Automation] native-image run fails for net.sf.ehcache:ehcache-core:2.5.0; label=fails-native-image-run; body_chars=8015

risks: Terracotta clustered-cache features are optional integrations and would require external infrastructure; avoid them unless explicitly testing only local XML/config parsing.
Ehcache also has provided servlet, Hibernate, and sizeof-agent integrations, but those are not required for meaningful core cache/transaction coverage and should not be added without targeted tests.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: Ehcache Core has useful in-process cache coverage without external services, but meaningful coverage of its transaction/XA paths needs provided/test-only transaction infrastructure that the normal scaffold will not add.
